name: Chocolate Malt Bars2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9 x 9 x 2-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. To prepare the bars, combine flour, baking powder, sugar, malted milk powder, and malted milk balls in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, skim milk, and vanilla extract.
5. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
6. Spread mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, to prepare the frosting, combine powdered sugar, cocoa powder, margarine, water, and vanilla extract until combined or desired spreading consistency.
9. When bars are cool, spread frosting and sprinkle with remaining malted milk balls.
